title: UI and UX Design Connections Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A research-based profile representing a user type?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: The steps a user takes to reach a goal?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A low-detail layout plan for an interface?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: An interactive or visual model used to test a design?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Observing users to find design problems?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Organizing content so people can find and understand it?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Controls that help users move through a product?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A cue that suggests how something can be used?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A system response that confirms an action or state?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Designing products for people with varied abilities?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A visual difference that helps elements stand apart?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Arranging elements to show importance?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Using familiar patterns across an interface?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A design state that communicates a problem?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A design state shown when there is no content yet?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Helping new users begin using a product?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: Short interface text that guides users?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: A shared set of reusable design rules and components?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: The visible and interactive parts of a product?
Which UI and UX Design concept is described by this clue: The overall experience a person has using a product?
